fields.helpText: This is the name of the electronic billing report.

fields.setOfCodes: 0:IGNORE THE REPORT;1:MAIL REPORT TO MAIL GROUP;
fields.helpText: This is the indicator that tells the system what to do when it receives  an electronic message identified as this report.  It can either be ignored or saved via a mail message to the IB EDI SUPERVISOR mail group.
This is the description of the report that will be displayed when the report name is.
